name: Farmer
description: A patient grower who knows the soil and the seasons.

name: Artisan
description: A practiced maker skilled at turning raw materials into useful goods.

name: Militia
description: A local defender with basic weapons training and a steady nerve.

name: Drunkard
description: A battered survivor whose poor choices have produced unusual resilience.

name: Scholar
description: A seeker of forgotten knowledge who recognizes clues others overlook.
